title: Class Names Should Comply with a Naming Convention
description: Enforces a consistent naming convention for class names in Python code.
message: Class name does not comply with the naming convention.
impact: Readability and maintainability of the codebase.
recommendation: Adopt a consistent naming convention for class names.

noncompliant.description: Class name does not follow the PEP8 naming convention.

compliant.description: Class name follows the PEP8 naming convention.

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent naming conventions make it harder to understand and maintain the codebase.
how_to_fix: Update class names to follow a consistent naming convention.

checks.message: Class name does not comply with the naming convention.
